languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

languages.text: "Сенешаль, фантомы прошлого могут поглотить без остатка, если дать им волю. Когда-то я испытал это на себе, но с тех пор Омниссия сподвиг меня постичь способ справляться с этим. Я готов поделиться знанием".

"Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."
languages.original_text: "Сенешаль, фантомы прошлого могут поглотить без остатка, если дать им волю. Когда-то я испытал это на себе, но с тех пор Омниссия сподвиг меня постичь способ справляться с этим. Я готов поделиться знанием".

traits.locale_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

"Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

"Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

languages.text: «Senescal, si se les permite, los fantasmas del pasado pueden devorarnos por completo. Yo mismo pasé por eso, pero el Omnissiah me ha empujado a comprender las formas de dominarlos. Estoy dispuesto a compartir este conocimiento».
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: «Senescal, si se les permite, los fantasmas del pasado pueden devorarnos por completo. Yo mismo pasé por eso, pero el Omnissiah me ha empujado a comprender las formas de dominarlos. Estoy dispuesto a compartir este conocimiento».

languages.text: 「家令殿、過去の亡霊は、放っておけば人を丸ごと呑み込みかねません。私自身それを経験しましたが、以来オムニッシアは、それらを御する術を会得するよう私を突き動かしてこられました。その知識を分かち合う用意があります」
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: 「家令殿、過去の亡霊は、放っておけば人を丸ごと呑み込みかねません。私自身それを経験しましたが、以来オムニッシアは、それらを御する術を会得するよう私を突き動かしてこられました。その知識を分かち合う用意があります」

languages.text: “总领，如果放任不管，往昔的幽灵足以将人整个吞噬，我亲身经历过。但自那以后，欧姆尼赛亚推动我领悟了驾驭它们的方法，而我愿意分享这份知识。”
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: “总领，如果放任不管，往昔的幽灵足以将人整个吞噬，我亲身经历过。但自那以后，欧姆尼赛亚推动我领悟了驾驭它们的方法，而我愿意分享这份知识。”

languages.text: "Truchsess, wenn man es zulässt, können die Geister der Vergangenheit einen Mann verschlingen. Ich habe es selbst erlebt, aber seitdem hat mir der Omnissiah die Mittel gezeigt, ihnen zu begegnen. Dieses Wissen bin ich bereit, zu teilen."
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Truchsess, wenn man es zulässt, können die Geister der Vergangenheit einen Mann verschlingen. Ich habe es selbst erlebt, aber seitdem hat mir der Omnissiah die Mittel gezeigt, ihnen zu begegnen. Dieses Wissen bin ich bereit, zu teilen."

languages.text: « Sénéchal, si on les laisse faire, les spectres du passé peuvent ravager un homme. J'en ai moi-même fait l'expérience, jusqu'à ce que l'Omnimessie me fasse la grâce de connaissances permettant de les repousser. Je peux partager ce savoir. »
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: « Sénéchal, si on les laisse faire, les spectres du passé peuvent ravager un homme. J'en ai moi-même fait l'expérience, jusqu'à ce que l'Omnimessie me fasse la grâce de connaissances permettant de les repousser. Je peux partager ce savoir. »

languages.text: "Seneşal, eğer dizginleri serbest bırakılırsa geçmişin hayaletleri bir adamı bütün olarak yutabilir. Bunu bizzat deneyimledim ama o zamandan beri Hermesih beni onlara hükmetmenin yollarını kavramaya itti. Bu bilgiyi paylaşmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "Seneschal, if given free rein, the phantoms of the past can swallow a man whole. I experienced it myself, but since then the Omnissiah has impelled me to comprehend the means of mastering them. I am willing to share the knowledge."

traits.locale_text: "Seneşal, eğer dizginleri serbest bırakılırsa geçmişin hayaletleri bir adamı bütün olarak yutabilir. Bunu bizzat deneyimledim ama o zamandan beri Hermesih beni onlara hükmetmenin yollarını kavramaya itti. Bu bilgiyi paylaşmaya hazırım."
